name: jdy_list_departments
description_zh: （递归）获取指定部门下的子部门列表
description: List sub-departments under a given department. Set has_child=true to recursively list all descendant departments. Returns departments[] each with dept_no, name, parent_no, type (0=regular, 2=external), status, integrate_id, seq. Root dept_no is 1. Rate limit: 10/s.

has_child.description: 是否递归获取所有子部门，默认false
